title: cicer yamashitae
intro: Cicer yamashitae, also known as the Japanese cicada plant, is a flowering plant in the borage family that is native to East Asia and is known for its unique, long-stemmed flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cicer yamashitae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of allergies and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
